## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| WatchROM version | `git log --oneline -1` |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | `python3 --version` |
| Device model | e.g. Ticwatch Pro 3 |
| Chipset | e.g. SC9863A |
| Android version | e.g. Android 11 |

## Command Used

```bash
watchrom <exact command>
```

## Expected vs Actual

**Expected:** what you expected to happen

**Actual:**
```
paste full terminal output here
```

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Connect device via USB with debugging enabled
2. Run `watchrom ...`
3. See error

## Additional Context

```
lsusb output (if USB device not detected):

```
